summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Wasteland Zero roguelite RPG game. Confirmed critical combat system bug - fight tiles do not trigger combat when clicked. Character creation, map display, and basic navigation work correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Combat does not trigger when clicking on map tiles with enemies (FIGHT, ELITE, BOSS types)
critical_bugs.impact: Game-breaking - core combat gameplay is non-functional
critical_bugs.details: Tested 20 different map tiles, none triggered combat screen. Player can move around map but cannot engage in battles.

ui_bugs.issue: Inventory and Skills screen navigation has DOM attachment issues
ui_bugs.impact: Users may experience navigation errors when switching between screens
ui_bugs.details: ElementHandle becomes detached from DOM during screen transitions

integration_issues.issue: moveToTile function not properly triggering startCombat for fight tiles
integration_issues.details: Map tiles show as cleared instead of triggering combat screen

passed_tests: Title screen loads with START GAME button
Save slot selection screen with 3 slots working
Character creation flow complete: Name input, Race selection (5 races), Archetype selection (10 archetypes), Trait selection (10 traits)
Map screen displays 7x7 grid correctly with player position
Map legend and UI elements present
Character stats display (STR, AGI, INT, END, LCK)
Fog of war system working (unexplored tiles hidden)
Player character info display (name, level, HP, XP)

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core UI and character creation working, but critical combat system broken

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix combat trigger system in MapScreen.jsx. The moveToTile function is not properly calling startCombat when clicking on fight tiles (FIGHT, ELITE, BOSS types). Combat screen never appears despite tiles being clicked. This is a game-breaking bug that prevents core gameplay.
